## BEM-924 completed | 2026-05-30
Prepared final unified working-system protocol after operator rejected fragmented protocol versions. This protocol synthesizes protocol v1.7, actual repository state, Claude audits, BEM-907..BEM-913 remediation, BEM-919..BEM-923 protocol drafts and all operator decisions from 2026-05-30.

Result: FINAL_WORKING_SYSTEM_PROTOCOL_APPROVED_WITH_REQUIREMENTS. Protocol is not Telegram-only, not provider-only and not prompt-only. It defines one implementation contract from current partial governance baseline to a working managing system. Working system definition: operator submits task via registered channel; task enters GD Curator route; policy and dispatch route it; provider-aware contour lifecycle executes Analyst proposal -> Auditor gate -> Executor -> Auditor result gate with revision cycles; primary providers are GPT Analyst, Claude Auditor, Claude Executor; GPT-Codex/Codex fallback replaces Claude roles on limits/unavailability; event log and managed channel record transitions; proof includes non-null CI/Git release evidence; operator receives canonical report; Claude can verify release bundle. Roadmap: BEM-925 SSOT identity/provider layer, BEM-926 rule/experience layer, BEM-927 envelope/channel layer, BEM-928 dispatch lifecycle layer, BEM-929 object/contour execution layer, BEM-930 proof/CI layer, BEM-931 Telegram operator layer, BEM-932 E2E validation layer, BEM-933 Claude re-audit/release package.
Local operator artifacts: BEM924_final_working_system_protocol_ru.docx and BEM924_final_working_system_protocol_ru.zip.
QA: DOCX rendered to 5 pages; contact sheet inspected; no edge clipping detected.
Next: operator review and approval of BEM-924, then execution starts with BEM-925 SSOT identity/provider layer.
